title: Recipe RofloTotem
description: Datapack/json creates a recipe for a totem craft.
body:
Datapack/json creates a recipe for a totem craft.

See the gallery for what the recipe itself looks like

Q:What does it even need and why?

A:Firstly, you will need:
 2 cobblestones
 2 sticks
 and finally a diamond.
 Secondly, you'll need this recipe to give your friends a totem when you couldn't get one from the chain of 
 development.
